task: System Upgrade, Content Expansion & Bug Fixes
instructions: Update the existing code to implement the following logic, UI features, and styling corrections. High priority: Ensure administrative actions are restricted to the dashboard.

requirements.logic: Prioritize Groq for simple topics (e.g., Common Entrance) for speed. Use Gemini for exhaustive, long-form content.
requirements.error_handling: Implement an automatic fallback loop. If the primary model (Groq) fails or returns 'insufficient credits', automatically cycle to the next model (Gemini Pro -> Gemini Flash) until a post is generated.

requirements.instruction: Update the generation prompt to include a wider range of topics. Specifically, ensure the model discusses 'Teacher Performance' and 'Student Performance' metrics, pedagogical strategies, and academic outcomes alongside exam prep.
requirements.goal: Broaden the blog's scope to provide value to both educators and students.

requirements.admin_ui: Add 'Edit' and 'Delete' icons next to each generated post on the ADMIN dashboard only. Edit allows fixing image URLs and text; Delete allows purging errors.
requirements.public_ui: STRICT REQUIREMENT: Remove any 'Delete' or 'Edit' functionality from the public blog page. These must be invisible and inaccessible to readers.

requirements.issue: System incorrectly tags WAEC content as JAMB.
requirements.fix: Refine the prompt and tagging function to ensure the exam body badge (WAEC vs JAMB) dynamically matches the subject matter.

requirements.issue: Inconsistent formatting causing horizontal layout breakage.
styling_rules: Ensure code blocks or long strings use 'max-width: 100%' and 'overflow-x: auto'.
Remove fixed-width constraints causing container overflow.

output_format: Provide updated JavaScript and CSS code blocks ready for integration.
